With this girl toy with science kit for kids age 8+ you can really become a scientist by using this science craft box for kids!

【EDUCATIONAL TOY FOR BOYS & GIRLS 7 8 9 10 11 12+ YEARS OLD】 An Educational science kit full of activities combining fun and education, ideal toys for 8+ year olds girls. This science lab for kids with science experiments for kids is a unique toy for 8 year old girls and boys! You'll learn about 15 women who, over the centuries, had to show courage and determination to follow their dreams and succeed in male-dominated areas.

【STEM TOY AGE 8+】This science kit is perfect for children, girls and boys 8-14 years old who love the world of science and cosmetics. An Educational toy inspired by the STEAM methodology (before known as STEM toy). STEAM stands for Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts and Mathematics. These toys help children to acquire knowledge in these 5 areas, stimulating their skills while playing. Educational book included in 7 languages (english, german, french, spanish, italian, dutch and portuguese).

【ORIGINAL GIFT FOR CHILDREN】This educational toy with craft box for kids age 8+ is the perfect Christmas or Birthday gift for 8 year olds girls and boys. A different science kit for kids age 8 they will never forget! A Stem Toy made by scientists, approved by parents and loved by the kids.
description: From the manufacturer Have Fun while Learning with Science4you! Get to know 15 super-women from the world of science over the years and recreate their experiences! An educational science kit for kids with 26 contents and challenges that develop children's creativity and psychomotor skills. 13 Science Experiments Learn how to make a Binary Code Keychain inspired by programmer Ada Lovelace or extract DNA from real fruit while discovering some Rosalind Franklin curiosities. Science Lab for Girls and Boys This science lab for kids is a unique toy for 8 years old girls and boys! You'll learn about 15 women who, over the centuries, had to show courage and determination to follow their dreams and succeed in male-dominated areas. Original Gift for Kids with 8+ Years This educational toy with craft box for kids age 8+ is the perfect Christmas or Birthday gift for girls and boys who love kids craft kits and science experiments for kids. Kids Craft Kit with 31 Contents Educational in 7 languages (‎English, Italian, French, Portuguese, German, Spanish, Dutch). Binary coding beads; Blue colouring; Scratch off inspirational poster; X-ray; Protective goggles; Separation beads; Sodium bicarbonate; Wooden spatula; Tweezers; Scientist's suitcase; Card with graphic elements; Gloves; Ball; Funnel; Pasteur pipettes; Test tube with lid; Green bean seeds; Small measuring cup with lid; Eppendorf tube; Zip-lock bag; Gauza compress; Decorative stickers; Wooden stick; Erlenmeyer flask; Petri dish; flowerpot. Educational STEAM Toy Science4you aims to develop educational toys that combine fun with education by fostering curiosity and experimentation. An Educational toy inspired by the STEAM methodology (before known as STEM toy). STEAM stands for Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts and Mathematics.These toys help children to acquire knowledge in these 5 areas, stimulating their skills while playing.
